# RTGU version 1 format

RTGU is a length-delimited unit container. The authoritative machine-readable definition is `rtgunit/schema.json`. All fixed-width values use little-endian order.

Header: `magic[4], version:u16, flags:u16=0, root_tag:u16, root_length:u32`. The root payload must consume the remainder of the file exactly. Each child is `tag:u16, length:u32, payload[length]`.

Unsigned integers inside record payloads use base-128 uvarints. Nullable integers encode `value+1`, reserving zero for absent. Signed integers use zigzag encoding. Every counted table begins with its record count and must contain no trailing payload bytes.

## Tags

| Tag | Name | Required | Payload | Record |
| ---: | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| 1 | Unit | yes | children |  |
| 2 | Package | yes | bytes |  |
| 3 | ImportPath | yes | bytes |  |
| 7 | Text | yes | bytes |  |
| 8 | Tokens | yes | counted | Token |
| 9 | Decls | yes | counted | Decl |
| 10 | Funcs | yes | counted | Func |
| 11 | Indexes | no | counted | IndexExpr |
| 12 | Comps | no | counted | CompositeExpr |
| 13 | Assigns | no | counted | Assignment |
| 14 | Returns | no | counted | Return |
| 15 | Calls | no | counted | Call |
| 16 | Refs | no | counted | NameRef |
| 17 | Sels | no | counted | Selector |
| 18 | Types | no | counted | TypeInfo |
| 19 | TypeRefs | no | counted | TypeRef |
| 20 | Locals | no | counted | LocalDecl |
| 21 | Sigs | no | counted | FuncSignature |
| 22 | DeclMeta | no | counted | DeclMeta |
| 23 | Imports | no | counted | Import |
| 24 | Symbols | no | counted | Symbol |
| 25 | InitOrder | no | counted | InitOrderEntry |
| 26 | Consts | no | counted | ConstValue |
| 27 | TypeFields | no | counted | TypeFields |
| 28 | TypeIfaces | no | counted | TypeIface |
| 29 | Methods | no | counted | MethodInfo |
| 30 | TypeFuncs | no | counted | TypeFuncSig |
| 31 | Stmts | no | counted | Statement |

All known child tags are singletons. Readers reject duplicate known tags and missing required tags. Unknown child tags are skipped by length.

## Records

### Token

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| kind | uvarint |
| start | uvarint delta from previous start |
| size | uvarint |
| line | uvarint delta from previous line |

### Decl

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| kind | uvarint |
| name | byte span: start, length |
| tokens | token span: start, length |

### Func

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| name | byte span: start, length |
| start_tok | uvarint |
| name_tok | uvarint delta from start_tok |
| receiver | token span: start, length |
| body | token span: start, length |
| end_tok | uvarint delta from body end |

### ExprSpan

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| tokens | token span: start, length |

### Field

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| name_tok | nullable uvarint: value+1, zero means absent |
| type | token span: start, length |
| variadic | uvarint boolean |

### Import

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| name | length-prefixed bytes |
| import_path | length-prefixed bytes |
| package | nullable uvarint |
| name_tok | nullable uvarint |
| path_tok | uvarint |
| flags | uvarint bitset: dot=1, blank=2 |

### Symbol

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| name | length-prefixed bytes |
| kind | uvarint |
| package | nullable uvarint |
| token | uvarint |
| owner_kind | uvarint |
| owner_index | uvarint |

### DeclMeta

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| decl_index | uvarint |
| symbol | nullable uvarint |
| value_index | uvarint |
| alias | uvarint boolean |
| type | nullable token span: start+1, length |
| value | nullable token span: start+1, length |
| values | counted ExprSpan |

### InitOrderEntry

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| decl_index | uvarint |

### ConstValue

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| decl_index | uvarint |
| kind | uvarint |
| value | kind union: zigzag integer, length-prefixed bytes, or uvarint boolean |

### FuncSignature

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| func_index | uvarint |
| receiver | counted Field |
| params | counted Field |
| results | counted Field |

### Statement

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| func_index | uvarint |
| kind | uvarint |
| tokens | token span: start, length |
| expr | nullable token span |
| body | nullable token span |
| else | nullable token span |

### TypeInfo

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| kind | uvarint |
| name | byte span: start, length |
| decl | uvarint |
| symbol | nullable uvarint |
| alias | uvarint boolean |
| type | nullable token span |
| length | nullable token span |
| key | nullable token span |
| element | nullable token span |

### TypeFields

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| type_index | uvarint |
| fields | counted Field |

### TypeIface

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| type_index | uvarint |
| embeds | counted token spans |
| methods | counted name_tok, params Field list, results Field list |

### TypeFuncSig

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| type_index | uvarint |
| params | counted Field |
| results | counted Field |

### MethodInfo

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| name_tok | uvarint |
| type_index | uvarint |
| symbol | uvarint |
| func_index | uvarint |
| pointer | uvarint boolean |

### TypeRef

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| owner_kind | uvarint |
| owner_index | uvarint |
| kind | uvarint |
| token | uvarint |
| base_tok | uvarint |
| dot_tok | uvarint |
| package | nullable uvarint |
| symbol | nullable uvarint |

### LocalDecl

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| func_index | uvarint |
| kind | uvarint |
| name | byte span: start, length |
| token | uvarint |
| scope | nullable uvarint |
| value_index | uvarint |
| alias | uvarint boolean |
| type | nullable token span |
| value | nullable token span |
| values | counted ExprSpan |

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| owner_kind | uvarint |
| owner_index | uvarint |
| tokens | token span |
| base | token span |
| open_tok | uvarint |
| close_tok | uvarint |
| index | token span |

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| owner_kind | uvarint |
| owner_index | uvarint |
| tokens | token span |
| type | token span |
| open_tok | uvarint |
| close_tok | uvarint |
| elements | counted ExprSpan |

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| func_index | uvarint |
| kind | uvarint |
| tokens | token span |
| op_tok | uvarint |
| left | token span |
| right | token span |
| targets | counted ExprSpan |
| values | counted ExprSpan |

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| func_index | uvarint |

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| owner_kind | uvarint |
| owner_index | uvarint |
| kind | uvarint |
| callee_tok | uvarint |

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| owner_kind | uvarint |
| owner_index | uvarint |
| kind | uvarint |
| token | uvarint |
| index | nullable uvarint |

| Field | Encoding |
| --- | --- |
| owner_kind | uvarint |
| owner_index | uvarint |
| kind | uvarint |
| base_tok | uvarint |
| dot_tok | uvarint |
| name_tok | uvarint |
| base_kind | uvarint |
| base_index | nullable uvarint |
| base_package | nullable uvarint |
| package | nullable uvarint |
| symbol | nullable uvarint |

## Validation

- The flags field is zero and the root payload consumes the file exactly.
- All required child tags occur exactly once; every other known child tag occurs at most once.
- Unknown version-1 child tags are skipped using their checked length.
- Every payload is consumed exactly; truncated, overflowing, overlong, or trailing record data is invalid.
- Token byte offsets and lines are monotonic, token spans stay inside Text, and the final token is EOF.
- Byte spans, token spans, owner indexes, and table indexes stay inside the tables they reference.
- Boolean fields contain only zero or one and enum fields contain a defined value.

## Compatibility

- Same version: Readers ignore unknown child tags and reject duplicate known singleton tags.
- New optional tags: Writers may add an optional tag without changing the version.
- Breaking changes: Changing a required tag, an existing payload, the header, or validation semantics requires a new version.
- Unsupported versions: Readers reject versions they do not implement.
